_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Verify that the software application/network/system accreditation and assurance documentation is current.
reference_document_element_description: Implement and operate data observability infrastructure that provides pipeline lineage, execution history, data quality metrics, and proactive alerting for anomalies and SLA violations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-014 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.401), RM-T-006 (RM, cosine: 0.401).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.7/10 (raw 0.171). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [accreditation, application, assurance, current, documentation, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, anomalies, data, execution, history, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.853, R=0.840). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Verify that the software application/network/system accreditation and assurance" and "Implement and operate data observability infrastructure that provides pipeline l" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.406 > STS 0.171 (gap +0.235). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [accreditation, application, assurance, current, documentation, network]. WIDAI terms: [alerting, anomalies, data, execution, history, implement].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.235 with low STS 0.171. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
